introductionTour.description: Use the level selector to switch between levels and track your progress.
You can erase your progress for specific levels here if you want to revise them.
Save your current Blockly workspace to a file so you can reload it later.
Load a previously saved Blockly workspace from a file.
Reset the Blockly workspace back to its starting state.
Compile your Blockly program so it can run in WRAMP.
Download the Blockly program as WRAMP code.
Undo the last instruction executed in your program.
Run the program continuously from the current state.
Step through the program one instruction at a time.

parallelRegistersHighlight.description: Click here to inspect the parallel registers.

serialPortHighlight.description: Click here to inspect the serial port output. This is where the output of the starter program will appear.

physicalComponentsHighlight.description: Click here to inspect the physical components.
